question: How long did it take me to assemble the IKEA bookshelf?

User plans to visit West Elm, Crate & Barrel, and IKEA this weekend to compare coffee tables with storage, will read online reviews and ratings to assess quality and durability, and seeks advice on prioritizing factors such as storage needs, budget, style, and material.
